title: Husky Commit Governance Capability Pack Skill
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/husky-commit-governance-capability-pack.zip -o husky-commit-governance-capability-pack.zip && unzip -o husky-commit-governance-capability-pack.zip -d ./husky-commit-governance-capability-pack

Usage:
Use this skill to install lean local hooks that prevent bad commits before CI.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Apply the husky commit governance capability pack to this repository."

# Required output
1) Hook matrix (pre-commit, commit-msg, optional pre-push)
2) Fast-path command list (< 10s target)
3) Contributor bypass/override policy
4) Drift and maintenance checklist
detailMarkdown:
# Husky Commit Governance Capability Pack Skill

Expert husky capability pack for lightweight local quality gates, commit message enforcement, and low-friction contributor workflows.

## Install

```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/husky-commit-governance-capability-pack.zip -o husky-commit-governance-capability-pack.zip && unzip -o husky-commit-governance-capability-pack.zip -d ./husky-commit-governance-capability-pack
```

## Usage
Use this skill to install lean local hooks that prevent bad commits before CI.
